summary: Pitch is significantly off, making the recording sluggish despite otherwise decent sound.
review: Both reviewers note that the tape plays far too slow and out of pitch, which detracts heavily from listening enjoyment. Aside from the speed issue the audio itself is described as good, but no musical highlights or performance details are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; both criticize pitch/speed while one gives a neutral three‑star rating, leading to an overall average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback is noticeably slow and out of pitch; otherwise the sound quality is acceptable.
